title: Control and management
doc_html:
§3283.  Control and management

The fund shall be under the control and management of and shall be administered by a board of directors composed as hereinafter set forth.  

Acts 1976, No. 615, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 33:2132 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.

§3283.  Control and management
The fund shall be under the control and management of and shall be administered by a board of directors composed as hereinafter set forth.
Acts 1976, No. 615, §1; Redesignated from R.S. 33:2132 by Acts 1991, No. 74, §3, eff. June 25, 1991.
